posts.text: The quiet moments are often the most important. Last night just before Cabinet members walked onto the House floor for the President’s State of the Union, we joined together in prayer, giving all thanks and praise to God, and praying for the clarity and strength to listen to Him, serve Him, and do His will.
Happy birthday to my one and only  ❤️ Over and over again, I do.
USA!!!!! Amazing victories by America’s  men and women hockey teams!! Incredible!!!      🇺🇸🇺🇸🇺🇸

I knew Jesse Jackson to be a kind man and a dear friend who never hesitated to call me with an encouraging word, prayers and advice with messages that often centered around, “Stay strong.  Don’t back down.  Pray and take shelter in God. Do the right thing for the country.” To the Jackson family, may the warmth of God’s unconditional love surround you all.
A day late, but yesterday was for us ❤️ You are my forever valentine. I love you with all my heart!
Good morning 🙏🏽

I knew Jesse Jackson to be a kind man and a dear friend who never hesitated to call me with an encouraging word, prayers and advice with messages that often centered around, “Stay strong.  Don’t back down.  Pray and take shelter in God. Do the right thing for the country.” To the Jackson family, may the warmth of God’s unconditional love surround you all.
A day late, but yesterday was for us ❤️ You are my forever valentine. I love you with all my heart.  We have been through many adventures over the years, and I am grateful for every one!

Senator Mark Warner and his friends in the Propaganda Media have repeatedly lied to the American people that I or ODNI “hid” a whistleblower complaint in a safe for 8 months. This is a blatant lie. Here is the truth.

Tulsi on anti-ICE mob 'protesting' at Minneapolis church: "One of the main reasons I left the Democrat Party was because of their hostility towards God and those who have faith in or are trying to cultivate their love for God. Those so-called 'protestors' who tried to intimidate and terrorize innocent women, children, and men in the Minneapolis church is just another example of their hostility towards God and His worshippers. Such behavior is demoniac and should be condemned by everyone, and tho
Take a deep breath 🙏🏽#meditation
My heart is filled with gratitude, aloha and peace! Happy 2026! #2026
#charliekirk

I recently visited Hiroshima, and stood at the epicenter of a city scarred by the unimaginable horror caused by a single nuclear bomb dropped in 1945. What I saw, the  stories I heard, and the haunting sadness that remains, will stay with me forever.
Thank you, President Trump, for the opportunity to serve as a member of your cabinet to defend the safety, security and freedom of the American people.  I look forward to getting to work.

The best way for us to honor our veterans is to only send our men and women in uniform into harm's way as a last resort, when no other options exist, and actually take care of them and their families if and when they return home. As a Lieutenant Colonel in the Army Reserves, serving as a solider for over 21 years with countless great Americas, this is the actual way to honor our veterans. #VeteransDay
